title: Policy: Modify Policy Settings
scenario: Policy-controlled settings from Lens Cloud are locked and greyed out in Poly Studio Mobile app with managed-by-policy dialog
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure the target Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open the Device Settings screen.
4. Apply a policy (e.g., disable ANC, lock Equalizer, or restrict Transparency Mode) to the device via Lens Cloud.
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the policy-controlled setting (e.g., Audio Settings → ANC, Equalizer, or Transparency Mode).
6. Observe the UI state of the policy-controlled setting.
7. Attempt to modify the policy-controlled setting (e.g., toggle ANC, change EQ preset, or adjust Transparency Mode).
expected: The policy-controlled setting is greyed out/locked and cannot be modified. When attempting to change it, a dialog appears indicating the setting is managed by policy.
